title: BOSS KIT
description: A vanilla and server friendly mod pack with quality of life mods for a better experience
body:
![Boss kit mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d9689b9a4cec73ad258fdeb740f1be78b26ec00.png)
## **Boss kit modpack**

### **A vanilla and server friendly mod pack with quality of life mods for a gaming better experience!**

The mod pack adds many features wihch the major ones are these:

- **● [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove) mod**- allows you to move while your inventory is open.
- **● [WI Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom) mod**- allows you to zoom with different settings.
- **● [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) mod**- allows you to use shader packs.
- **● [ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus) mod**- allows you to join any server no matter what version it is.
- **● [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) mod**- allows you to map your world & set way pints and see mobs, items, players.
- **● [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)/[Voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy)(from 1.21.11 up)mod**- loads and increase your render distance by hundreds.
- **● [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) mod**- allows you to talk to other players in supported servers and worlds.
- **● [World Edit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit) mod**- for single player use only and on supported servers.

And it also contains some performance enhancing mods for better frame rate like sodium, ferritecore, lithium etc, and it adds quality of life features for better game play like dynamic lighting and better hunger system.

![boss isaz stamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/581c6517e204279dd432794d14dd777ab3ce3a46.png)

> If you see this, you can go to the discord server and claim your **special role** !
> ![boss isaz letter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0504913271686050b4cbcabd2763b928d9f58ba_0.webp)

**_. This modpack is not made for performance enhancement, it adds quality of life features !_**

![Boss game kit mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d9689b9a4cec73ad258fdeb740f1be78b26ec00.png)
